summary: playlists merge: first chunk PUT (replaces destination) for idempotent re-runs; paginate sources via fetchFullPlaylist; corrected misleading 'dry-plan first' doc.
reason: POST /playlists/{id}/tracks appends. The original merge POST'd every chunk, so re-running with the same sources silently doubled the destination playlist. PUT for the first chunk replaces, POST for subsequent chunks appends — re-runs produce the same destination state. The Long description also claimed a future --apply flag with dry-plan-by-default; the command actually mutates immediately unless --dry-run is passed.
